title: selectTool moves elements twice per frame with smart guides
description: selectTool.ts:563-579 - elements moved to unsnapped position, then smart guides computed, then moved again. Compute snap algebraically first.

title: Add RAF throttling to mouse move handlers
description: Canvas.tsx:249 and selectTool mouse move fire on every native event without requestAnimationFrame batching. Rulers also redraw fully on every cursor move.

title: Knife tool multi-intersection splitting uses wrong segment indices
description: knifeTool.ts:116-128 - after first split, remaining hits still reference segment indices from original path. Need to adjust indices relative to remaining piece.

title: Extract shared hitTest to eliminate 4-way duplication
description: selectTool, eraserTool, eyedropperTool, directSelectTool each have their own hitTest with subtle differences. Extract to model/hitTest.ts.

title: Smart guides: split candidates by axis, add early exit
description: smartGuides.ts:108-130 - O(edges*candidates) per frame. Pre-split into x/y arrays, break on bestDist===0.

title: PropertiesPanel calls detectFillType 3-4 times per render
description: PropertiesPanel.tsx:469-475 - cache result in local variable instead of calling repeatedly.

title: CommandHistory has no size limit - unbounded memory
description: commands.ts undoStack/redoStack grow without bound. Add MAX_HISTORY_SIZE (200) and trim oldest entries.

title: removeChild crash on null parent during undo
description: AddElementCommand.undo() crashes with TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'removeChild') when the element's parent was already removed from the DOM (e.g. layer cleared outside command history). document.ts:70 used a non-null assertion on parentElement that fails at runtime. Fixed by adding null guards in removeElement() and AddElementCommand.undo/execute.
close_reason: Fixed: added null guards in document.ts removeElement() and commands.ts AddElementCommand.undo/execute

title: TextPath startOffset change bypasses command history
description: PropertiesPanel.tsx:422-425 - direct DOM mutation, not undoable. Use ModifyAttributeCommand.

title: Canvas SVG overflows flex container on viewport resize
description: When resizing the browser viewport (e.g. to 1280x1080), the canvas SVG element's natural height (from preserveAspectRatio) exceeds its flex container, causing the html element to scroll 403px. The canvas container has overflow:hidden but the parent flex containers don't have min-h-0 to prevent flex children from expanding. Found via playwright-cli benchmark testing.

title: No UI for rx/ry (rounded corners) on rect elements
description: The Properties panel has no input fields for rx and ry attributes on rect elements. Rounded rectangles from imported SVGs display correctly, but there is no way to create or modify rounded corners through the UI. This was found via benchmark comparison with W3C shapes-rect-01.svg which has rects with rx=30 and ry=50.

title: Eraser + DirectSelect hit test ignores transforms
description: eraserTool.ts:26 and directSelectTool.ts:196 use raw getBBox() without transforms. Use transformedAABB from geometry.ts. Also eyedropperTool has its own broken transformedAABB.

title: freeTransformTool rotate doesn't preserve base angle
description: freeTransformTool.ts:182-193 - rotation only uses mouse delta, not baseAngle+delta. Existing rotation is overwritten.

title: Pencil tool doesn't auto-switch to select after drawing
description: pencilTool.ts:71-103 - all other drawing tools switch to select+set selection. Pencil doesn't.

title: Input focus traps keyboard tool shortcuts
description: When a Properties panel input (SW, X, Y, W, H, Rot, etc.) has focus, pressing a tool shortcut key (r, l, p, e, v) types into the input instead of switching tools. The tool shortcut handler in useToolShortcuts checks for INPUT/TEXTAREA focus, but after pressing Enter to commit a value, focus may remain on the input. Found during benchmark automation: after setSW() the next drawRect's 'r' keypress went into the SW field. Workaround: blur active element before pressing tool keys.

title: Drawing tools don't respect layer lock
description: rectTool, ellipseTool, lineTool, penTool, pencilTool all call getActiveLayer() without checking data-locked='true'. Elements can be created on locked layers. Add lock check after getActiveLayer() in each tool's commit handler.

title: Eraser tool restores to wrong layer on undo
description: eraserTool.ts:138-141 - undo always appends to current active layer, not original parent. Capture parentElement+nextSibling at erase time.

title: Duplicated unionBBox and transformedAABB wrappers
description: selection.ts and selectTool.ts both have local unionBBox and transformedAABB wrappers. Consolidate into geometry.ts.

title: Default style bleeds fill to subsequent drawings
description: When drawing multiple rects in sequence with different fill modes (solid then none), the default style system leaks the previous fill color to the next drawing. Discovered via benchmark redraw: after setting R2 fill=fuchsia then drawing R3 with setFillNone(), R3 still gets a black fill instead of none. The defaultStyle.ts module doesn't properly reset when switching between fill types via the Properties panel.

title: Selection overlay rebuilds all DOM elements every frame
description: selection.ts:139-259 - updateOverlay removes+recreates all children on every call including during drag. Cache elements, only update positions.

title: Stroke color picker has allowNone=false - cannot set stroke=none via Properties panel
description: The ColorPicker for stroke in PropertiesPanel.tsx (line 478) passes allowNone={false}, which means the 'None (transparent)' button is not shown. Users cannot remove stroke via the Properties panel color picker. The only workaround is setting stroke-width to 0, which is semantically different from stroke=none. The fill color pickers for gradients (lines 538, 558) also have allowNone={false}.

title: PDF import appends layers after overlay groups
description: pdfImport.ts:141-143 - imported layers render on top of selection handles/grid/guides. Use insertBefore.
